name: Kyutai
description: Open AI research lab developing speech-to-speech models (Moshi) with ~160ms duplex latency.

seo.title: Kyutai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Kyutai: Open AI research lab developing speech-to-speech models (Moshi) with ~160ms duplex latency.

when_to_use: Building real-time voice AI applications with Moshi model
Deploying sub-200ms latency voice conversation systems
Experimenting with open-source real-time speech-to-speech models
Running French and English voice AI with open-weight models

cons: Not a production SaaS — self-host required
review.verdict: Exciting for builders who can self-host; not a drop-in replacement for voice APIs yet.
review.best_for: Researchers and infra-strong teams building open speech-to-speech prototypes
review.not_for: Product teams wanting managed voice infra with SLAs today

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
